name: PETERSON et al. v. CITY OF GREENVILLE
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in PETERSON et al. v. CITY OF GREENVILLE (373 U.S. 244, 1962 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
